privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Nutrition Plan: 'Lean Bulk Plan'. Target Meal: 'Morning Power Shake'. The final state of the meal must contain exactly 3 total items: exactly 1x 'Whey Protein Powder', 1x 'Peanut Butter', and 1x 'Oat Milk'. Ensure no duplicate entries remain and no portion amounts were modified.
